name: ☆Broken Spawn - LHG☆
description:
"The black hole of the window where you sleep, the night breeze carries something sweet, a peach tree... Wild women don't get the blues but I find that lately I've been crying like a tall child... So please, hurry, leave me, I can't breathe, please don't say you love me... 胸がはち切れそうで... One word from you and I would jump off of this ledge I'm on, baby... Tell me "don't", so I can crawl back in..."

("First Love/Late Spring" by Mitski)
